_comment: Provider model catalog. This is data, not code: updating a model name, fallback chain, or stale-model remap should be an edit here (or in the file pointed at by JARVIS_MODEL_CATALOG_PATH) followed by POST /runtime/models/reload — never a code change. Per-request model still respects the JARVIS_<PROVIDER>_*_MODEL env vars; this file supplies the defaults and the lists those env vars cannot express.
